finding: A signed and structurally valid deployment proof can still be replayed from an older workflow invocation unless acceptance also binds the proof to the current source commit, exact workflow-run URL, and a bounded freshness window.

rules: source_commit must match the current workflow commit
workflow_run must match the current workflow invocation
generated_at must be within a two-hour freshness window
generated_at may not exceed five minutes of tolerated future clock skew

verification.route: isolated Node test execution using byte-identical committed logic
cases: fresh proof bound to current commit and run accepted

limits: The new validator is committed and independently tested but is not yet wired into cloudflare-pages-research.yml.
Freshness and context binding reduce replay risk but do not prove scientific claims, content correctness, or operator intent.
No live Cloudflare deployment occurred because the required GitHub Environment credentials remain unavailable to this run.
falsification_route: Construct a proof from a different commit, run URL, stale timestamp, or future timestamp and confirm the validator rejects it; then wire the validator into the production deployment workflow and verify a real run accepts only its own generated proof.
privacy_boundary: No credentials, private chat, health information, diagnosis, or treatment content is included.
